subcodes.first_line: O My spiritual friend! In the words of the mystic of Rum: "When the rose hath departed and the garden is laid waste, from whom shall the fragrance of the rose be sought?" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست روحانی من بقول عارف رومی چونکه گل رفت و گلستانشد خراب بوی گلرا از که
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @poems and quotation from poetry, @eulogies; reminiscences
